docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY GLADSTONE & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT SHABAHANGI, NADER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHABAHANGI, NADER
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FORM & REQUEST FOR COURT FEE OF $10 MAILED TO DEFT'S SISTER AMIR KIA. DEFT'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST LETTER FILED.
DEFENDANT 'S BROTHER REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE HEARING DATE TO MARCH 29, 2001 AT 8:30 AM SENT TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-25-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-29-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-29-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-18-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-18-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-04-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMMISSIONER KAPLAN RECUSES HERSELF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLADSTONE & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHABAHANGI, NADER $1,741.07 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,796.07 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
